no-restricted-syntax.message: Use semantic theme tokens (bg-background, bg-card, bg-primary, text-foreground, text-primary, border-border, ring-ring, bg-muted, ...) instead of hardcoded Tailwind color utilities (slate/gray/zinc/neutral/stone/blue/indigo-NNN). See docs/frontend/token-migration-allowlist.md.
